metadata.description: Nano Banana 2 on Kie.ai: next-gen text and image input workflows. Docs, features, and deep links to our image generator.

page.title: Nano Banana 2
page.description: Nano Banana 2 improves control with updated input schemas — aspect ratio, resolution, and multi-image inputs where supported.
